svg.title: LLM Validator System Architecture
svg.desc: Full system architecture showing the browser UI, Express server, helper modules, Ollama, and SQLite database with data flow between them.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Schemas tab in the frontend')

g.text: SQLite setup · creates schemas, failures, calls tables on startup

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the LLM call happen in the retry loop?')
